title: Privacy Policy
description: We value your privacy. This privacy policy explains how AI Image Splitter handles your information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to AI Image Splitter ("we," "our," or "the service"). We are committed to protecting your privacy, and this privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our website and services.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.overview: Our core principle is to maximize protection of your privacy. Here's how we handle data:

imageProcessing.title: Image Processing
imageProcessing.content: All images you upload to AI Image Splitter are processed locally in your browser. This means your images are never uploaded to our servers or leave your device. We cannot access, view, or store any of your image content.

technicalData.title: Technical Data
technicalData.content: To measure traffic, understand site usage, and improve performance, we may collect limited technical and usage information through tools such as Google Analytics.
items: Approximate geolocation derived from IP-related information
Page views, engagement events, and similar site usage statistics via Google Analytics

noPersonalData.title: No Personal Information Collection
noPersonalData.content: We do not require account registration to use the image splitting tool, and we do not intentionally collect directly identifying information such as:
items: Names, email addresses, or contact details required to use the tool
Payment information, because the service is currently free to use
Uploaded image files or file content for splitting, because image processing stays in the browser

dataUsage.title: How We Use Information
dataUsage.content: The limited anonymous data we collect is used solely for:
items: Improving website performance and user experience
Understanding usage patterns to optimize features

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell your uploaded images or file content. We may share limited technical and usage data with third-party service providers that help us operate, measure, secure, and improve the site. At this time, our primary third-party measurement provider is Google Analytics. If Google advertising products are enabled on this site in the future, Google and its partners may also process data as described below.

googleAnalytics.title: Google Services
googleAnalytics.content: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use the site. Google Analytics may use first-party cookies and collect browser and device information, approximate location derived from IP-related information, and on-site interaction data such as page views and engagement events. If Google ads are displayed on this site in the future, Google and its partners may also use cookies, web beacons, IP addresses, and other identifiers to serve, measure, and, where permitted by law, personalize ads. You can learn more about how Google uses data through Google's own policies and tools.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement the following measures to protect your privacy:
measures: All image processing occurs client-side, never uploaded to servers
Website uses HTTPS encryption to protect data transmission
We do not store any user-generated content
Regular security updates to prevent potential threats

cookies.title: Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar browser technologies for essential site functions, language and regional preferences where applicable, analytics, security, and, if enabled in the future, advertising.
items: Support essential site functionality and language or regional handling
Measure traffic and usage through Google Analytics
Help protect the site, prevent abuse, and maintain reliability
If ads are enabled in the future, support ad delivery, frequency capping, measurement, and, where permitted, ad personalization by Google and its partners
cookies.note: You can control cookies through your browser settings. If you are located in the EEA, the UK, or Switzerland, we may request consent for cookies or other local storage where required by law.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to request access to, deletion of, restriction of, or objection to certain personal data processed by us or our service providers. Because we do not require user accounts and do not upload your image files to our servers for splitting, the directly identifying data we control is limited.
rights: Stop using our service at any time
Use Google's available privacy or opt-out tools where applicable
Contact us with privacy-related questions or requests

minorProtection.title: Children's Privacy Protection
minorProtection.content: Our service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and discover that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us, and we will immediately delete such information.

internationalUsers.title: International Users
internationalUsers.content: AI Image Splitter is available to users worldwide. Depending on the services used on the site, limited technical and usage data may be processed in countries other than your own. When Google Analytics or Google advertising products are used, Google may process data according to its own policies and applicable legal requirements. Your uploaded image files are processed locally in your browser and are not uploaded to our servers for splitting.

policyChanges.title: Privacy Policy Changes
policyChanges.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page and the "Last Updated" date will be updated. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed of any changes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us:
contact.response: We will respond to your inquiry within 48 hours of receipt.
